## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential hire for chief content officer role and strategic direction for the company.](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Potential high-profile hire: Former Crunch editor-in-chief (8 years) with extensive network in tech/VC/media](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Role considerations: Chief Content Officer vs. broader VP of Client role, balancing content focus with future expansion](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Strategic implications: New hire could significantly boost connections, coverage, and editorial capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Organizational structure: Potential overlap with existing team members (Jason, Kyle) needs careful consideration](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

## Topics

### Potential Chief Content Officer Hire

  - [Former Crunch editor-in-chief (8 years), also worked at The Next Web](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Managed team of 120 across 20 countries, 24/7 editorial coverage](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Extremely well-connected in tech/VC/startup/media circles](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Left Crunch due to burnout, seeking reset (now in Fresno, 2 hours from Bay Area)](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Described as humble, nice, and deeply experienced in disruptive media](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

### Role Definition and Company Direction

  - [Potential role: Chief Content Officer or similar to VP of Client overall](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Responsibilities: Own editorial function, quality, hiring, scaling editors](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Strategic value: Ease of getting coverage, introductions to startups](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Concern: Hiring a content-heavy hitter might naturally push company in that direction](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Marcel's approach: Transparent about evolving roles, 3-6 month change cycles](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Organizational Structure Considerations

  - [Potential overlap with Jason (automation, new growth areas) and Kyle](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Marcel avoiding overthinking structure, emphasizing startup fluidity](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Bridget cautioned about self-fulfilling prophecy of hiring direction](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

### Current Team Dynamics

  - [Dave and Jacob: Director-level functional leaders, managing pods](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Jason: Focused on opening new lanes, growth hacks, automation](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Kyle: Role not specified, but mentioned in context of potential overlap](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review candidate's full profile (Marcel to send)](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Evaluate strategic fit and potential impact on company direction](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Consider how to balance content focus with other growth areas](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Assess potential role overlap and organizational structure implications](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Continue discussions on timing and prioritization of expansion beyond content](https://fathom.video/share/btkGivaPJpFwDUe6pwVDAkdyxjMN378w?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
